character.name: Warblade
character.prompt: tall imposing warrior with lean muscular build, long legs and broad shoulders, NOT stocky NOT short, upright 6-head-height figure, completely bare head with no helmet no visor no headgear, short battle-worn hair, scarred determined face with intense eyes fully visible and prominent, dark iron armor on body with open chest plate, large two-handed greatsword held in RIGHT hand with blue-purple rift energy crackling along blade edge, short tattered cape behind, dominant combat stance, dark iron and cold steel blue palette, rift energy blue-purple crack lines glowing at armor joints and sword edge, dark fantasy roguelite, RIMA universe
